creator: vsityz@gmail.com
text:
in /etc/make.conf

.if ${.CURDIR:N*/ports/math/pspp*} == ""
CFLAGS+= -O2 -march=athlon64-sse3 -mtune=athlon64-sse3 -pipe -Wformat -Wformat-security
CPPFLAGS+= -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2
CC=gcc47
CXX=g++47
CPP=cpp47
.endif

gcc47 -std=gnu99 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I.  -I./gl -I./gl  -I./src/language/stats -I./src/language/expressions -I./src/language/expressions -I./src -I./lib -DPKGDATADIR=\"/usr/local/share/pspp\" -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -I/usr/local/include -DLIBICONV_PLUG -Wall -W -Wwrite-strings -Wstrict-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Wno-sign-compare -Wmissing-prototypes -O2 -march=athlon64-sse3 -mtune=athlon64-sse3 -pipe -Wformat -Wformat-security -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fno-strict-aliasing -Wdeclaration-after-statement -MT src/math/ts/innovations.o -MD -MP -MF $depbase.Tpo -c -o src/math/ts/innovations.o src/math/ts/innovations.c &&\
mv -f $depbase.Tpo $depbase.Po
